mapper.insert: insert into kh_user (name, email, gender, birth_year, locale, timezone, lang, country, password, token_seed, verify_status) values (#{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gender,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{birthYear,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{locale,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{timezone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lang,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{country,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tokenSeed,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{verifyStatus,jdbcType=SMALLINT})
mapper.update:
update kh_user set
name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
gender = #{gender,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
birth_year = #{birthYear,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
locale = #{locale,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
timezone = #{timezone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
lang = #{lang,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
country = #{country,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = now() where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
update kh_user set verify_status = #{verifyStatus,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, update_time = now() where id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select id, name, email, gender, birth_year, locale, timezone, lang, country, password, token_seed, verify_status, create_time, update_time from kh_user where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
select id, name, email, gender, birth_year, locale, timezone, lang, country, password, token_seed, verify_status, create_time, update_time from kh_user
select id, name, email, gender, birth_year, locale, timezone, lang, country, password, token_seed, verify_status, create_time, update_time from kh_user where email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
